title: ReaScript Lua for Professional Automation
description: Generate powerful Lua scripts to expedite tasks, audio workflows, and DSP handling within REAPER 7.x.
body:
Act as an Audio Programming Specialist. Write a ReaScript utilizing Lua specifically designed for the REAPER DAW environment.

<context>
Task Objective: [DESCRIPTION OF THE AUTOMATION TASK]
Session Context: [TYPE_OF_SESSION_E.G._MIXING/SOUND_DESIGN]
Target Entities: [TRACKS / ITEMS / FX CHAINS / TIMELINE MARKERS]
</context>

<task>
Generate the script strictly adhering to these constraints:
- Absolute compatibility targeted at REAPER 7.x API standards.
- Formulate robust error catching utilizing native console tracing (`reaper.ShowConsoleMsg`).
- The script must run natively possessing zero external dependency requirements.
- Maintain absolutely clean code; apply comments exclusively where native API logic is un-intuitive.
- If user interaction is requested, execute GUI controls exclusively via the native REAPER API (ReaScript dialogs or native ImGui implementations).

Finalize by providing explicit installation and triggering instructions for the end user.
</task>
author: jules
